review_notes.summary: Cosmetic repaint passed both reviewers on first pass — no fix cycle needed. Sprint 5 is strictly presentation: new shared components (StatusPill, SectionHeader), StatusBadge removed, 8 pages + 4 components repainted to IBM Plex + semantic tokens. Zero business-logic diff, zero new dependencies, zero type regressions.
product_notes: Russian labels preserved (Черновик/Подтверждено/Выдано/etc.); /admin header translated from English 'Admin Panel' to 'Администрирование'.
accent-bright applied consistently on primary CTAs across touched pages.
StatusPill variant mapping stable across list+detail (CONFIRMED → full/emerald everywhere, etc.).
Mobile warehouse flow preserved — 5-step wizard + 44px+ tap targets (h-14/h-12).
technical_notes: Business logic untouched — zero handler/effect/fetch additions or removals across 8 repainted pages.
StatusPill (9 variants) and SectionHeader (eyebrow + title + actions) both clean, no side effects, typed props.
StatusBadge fully migrated — 0 remaining references; StatusPill imported in 6 sites.
tsc --noEmit clean; web build clean (no size regressions); 366/366 tests (no flakes on this run).
deferred_out_of_scope: /login types still say RENTAL_ADMIN (pre-existing on main, not user-visible — future cleanup).
/admin Users tab label 'Админ рентала' (pre-existing, future cleanup).
Barcode IDs (LR-XXX-NNN) remain visible on /equipment/[id]/units and /warehouse/scan (pre-existing content/IA question, separate from cosmetic repaint).
finance/* inline styles (5 items) — Sprint 3 code, SVG bar fills + dynamic category dots, legitimately dynamic.
